title: Atharva Veda 10.2: The Body as Cosmic City
description: The human body as a city with eight wheels and nine gates, containing the divine.
introduction: The human body as a city with eight wheels and nine gates, containing the divine.

translation.original_text: aṣṭācakrā navadvārā devānāṃ pūr ayodhyā | tasyāṃ hiraṇyayaḥ kośaḥ svargo jyotiṣāvṛtaḥ
translation.text: Eight-wheeled, nine-gated is the impregnable city of the gods. In it is a golden vessel, heavenly, covered with light.
